entries.description: Founding of the first hospitals and hospices: Basil of Caesarea and early Christians established institutions for the sick, poor, and dying based on the Good Samaritan and 'I was sick and you visited me' teachings
entries.causation_evidence: Historical records of Basil's hospital in Caesarea and early Church philanthropy

entries.description: Abolition of the slave trade: William Wilberforce and evangelical Christians cited 'love thy neighbor' and human dignity in Christ to end the British slave trade
entries.causation_evidence: Wilberforce parliamentary records and evangelical abolitionist literature

entries.description: Civil rights movement: Martin Luther King Jr. explicitly grounded nonviolent resistance and equality in the Sermon on the Mount and 'love thy neighbor'
entries.causation_evidence: MLK speeches and writings referencing Jesus' teachings

entries.description: Indian independence movement: Mahatma Gandhi drew satyagraha (truth-force) and nonviolence directly from the Sermon on the Mount
entries.causation_evidence: Gandhi's own writings on Jesus' teachings

entries.description: International Red Cross founding: Henri Dunant explicitly inspired by Christian charity and the Good Samaritan parable
entries.causation_evidence: Dunant's writings and Red Cross founding documents

entries.description: Founding of medieval universities (Oxford, Cambridge, Paris, etc.): Established on Christian principles of truth-seeking and charity
entries.causation_evidence: Historical charters of early European universities

entries.description: South African Truth and Reconciliation Commission: Archbishop Desmond Tutu applied Jesus' teachings on forgiveness and reconciliation post-apartheid
entries.causation_evidence: TRC official records and Tutu's writings

entries.description: Early Christian care for orphans, widows, and the poor: Systematic philanthropy that became model for global welfare systems
entries.causation_evidence: Early Church fathers' writings and historical accounts

entries.description: Universal Declaration of Human Rights: Core principles of dignity and equality rooted in Judeo-Christian teachings of imago Dei and neighborly love
entries.causation_evidence: UDHR drafting history and Christian influence on framers

entries.description: Global missionary hospitals and schools: Thousands of healthcare and education facilities built worldwide based on Jesus' commands to heal and teach
entries.causation_evidence: Missionary society records and WHO historical data
